allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8765/api/ai-layout -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"prompt":"Return only valid JSON: {\\"test\\":true}"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8765/api/ai-layout -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"prompt\\":\\"You are a hotel floor plan layout AI. Generate an optimal layout for a standard hotel guest floor.\\n\\nCOORDINATE SYSTEM:\\n- All values in millimeters \(mm\), integers only\\n- Canvas origin \(0,0\) top-left; X increases right, Y increases down\\n- Snap grid: 100mm\\n\\nBUILDABLE AREA:\\n  x: [13000, 27000] width=14000mm \(14.0m\)\\n  y: [11000, 19000] height=8000mm \(8.0m\)\\n  center: \(20000, 15000\)\\n  Target hotel floor area: 500m2\\n\\nELEMENTS:\\nCores \(ALL must be placed\):\\n  Core[0]: 5800x5800mm \(5.8m x 5.8m\)\\n\\nRoom Types:\\n  Type A: width=4500mm, depth=9000mm\\n  Type B: width=3900mm, depth=8500mm\\n\\nLAYOUT RULES:\\n1. Place core centered\\n2. Double-loaded corridor\\n3. No overlaps\\n4. All coordinates multiples of 100\\n\\nRESPOND WITH ONLY VALID JSON:\\n{\\\\\\"corePlacements\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\"groupIdx\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\"x_mm\\\\\\":17100,\\\\\\"y_mm\\\\\\":12100}],\\\\\\"roomPlacements\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\"typeId\\\\\\":\\\\\\"A\\\\\\",\\\\\\"x_mm\\\\\\":13000,\\\\\\"y_mm\\\\\\":11000,\\\\\\"rotation\\\\\\":0}],\\\\\\"strategy\\\\\\":\\\\\\"코어 중앙 배치 + double-loaded corridor\\\\\\"}\\"}")
